description: Final verification and TOC page number correction. After FEAT-001 is complete, verify the page count is exactly 45, verify all mundarija page numbers match actual pages, and fix any discrepancies.
steps: Step 1: Count all div.page elements and verify exactly 45 pages exist
Step 2: Map each section's starting page number by counting div.page elements from the start
Step 3: Update mundarija (TOC on page 2) with corrected page numbers that match actual content positions
Step 4: Verify page number footers show correct numbers (page 3 shows '3', page 4 shows '4', etc.)
Step 5: Final check that all formatting requirements are met (14pt, 1.5 line-height, correct margins, footnotes present, glossary has 20-30 terms)
acceptance_criteria: Mundarija page numbers exactly match actual page positions of each section
All 45 pages have correct sequential page number footers (starting from page 3)
verification: Open file and verify TOC page numbers match actual content pages
Verify page footer numbers are sequential from 3 to 45
